content:
📜 1. Weekly Performance-Based Challenge (Memorization + Live Engagement)

📜 Each week now includes a performance challenge requiring students to engage with literary text in an embodied way.

✔ Requires memorization of a passage, poem, or speech.
✔ Involves performance-based elements (tone, gesture, engagement).
✔ Challenges scale in difficulty with potential buffs/debuffs.

Example: Week 7 – Modernism & Literary Fragmentation

📜 Performance Challenge: “The Broken Voice of Modernity”
✔ Level 1 (Basic Challenge): Recite an excerpt from The Waste Land with dramatic emphasis.
✔ Level 2 (Advanced Challenge): Perform a fragmented monologue, cutting between different texts (Joyce, Woolf, Eliot).
✔ Level 3 (Master Challenge): Compose and perform a one-minute spoken word piece in modernist style.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 229 (chunk 229/555)
